_meta.description: Registry of recurring errors Forge has investigated. Each entry has a root cause, fix status, and PR link.

errors.title: fraud-graph errors silently swallowed
errors.symptom: No CloudWatch Lambda error metrics for fraud-graph-ingest despite known Neo4j failures. Function absent from nightly audit unmonitored list (because it never appeared as erroring).
errors.rootCause: Catch block returned { statusCode: 500 } instead of throwing. CloudWatch Lambda error metrics only fire when the handler throws. captureError was never called.
errors.fix: Add captureError import, call captureError in catch, then throw error.

errors.title: commitment-service job failures silently swallowed
errors.symptom: Job-level infrastructure failures (DynamoDB unavailable, network errors) returned { success: false } with no CloudWatch error metric. Nightly audit never detected these functions as erroring.
errors.rootCause: Outer catch blocks returned { success: false } instead of throwing. Inner per-item catch blocks correctly collect errors[] — only the outer job-level catch was wrong.
errors.fix: Add captureError import, outer catch calls captureError then throws. Inner per-item catches left unchanged.
